name: Five Nights in Anime RPG
description:
Welcome to your new career at Freddy's Anime Convention!

You are the new security guard working the night shift, surrounded by a group of sexy animatronic girls.

But, these girls like to play a little to rough with security guards like you, so a major chance of death (through broken pelvis) might be an issue. Watch the cameras, and fend away any animatronics who try to get in your office!

But, beware. Run out of power, and a new problem arises...

This bot (and the others) are based of the Official Arts of FNIA character descriptions so they are basically as accurate as possible :3

New Update:

-Added images

-Made a actual description of the building

-Added phone girl

-added Puppet

Next thing:

Reduce token amount so it works better.
